_comment: Copy this to config.json and edit. This is the ONLY file you change to pick cameras, count, order, and layout.
_grid_note: cols x rows = how many cells. Cameras below fill them left-to-right, top-to-bottom. Fewer cameras than cells = the extra cells are black. 1 camera + 1x1 grid = single fullscreen. Examples: 2x2 (4 cams), 3x2 (6), 3x3 (9), 2x1 (2 side by side).
_encoder_note: 'auto' picks hardware encoding per-OS (h264_videotoolbox on macOS, else libx264). Override with a specific ffmpeg encoder name if you know what you want.
_cameras_note: Add/remove entries to change the count. Reorder them to change grid position. 'url' is your camera's RTSP URL. For UniFi Protect: enable RTSP on the camera in Protect, then the URL is rtsp://NVR_IP:7447/<alias>. Some cameras embed credentials in the URL.
